task_completion.description: Open the draft legal memorandum document
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) is open displaying the document 'legal_memo_draft.docx', which contains contract law text and bracketed case citations.

task_completion.description: Convert the six bracketed inline case citations into proper footnotes
task_completion.visual_evidence: Superscript numbers appear in the main text replacing the square brackets, and a dedicated footnote section at the bottom of the page contains the corresponding case names (e.g., Hadley v. Baxendale, Jacob & Youngs v. Kent).

task_completion.description: Change the body text font to 12pt Liberation Serif or Times New Roman
task_completion.visual_evidence: The font family dropdown shows 'Liberation Serif' or 'Times New Roman' and the font size dropdown shows '12' while the body text is selected or being typed.

task_completion.description: Apply double line spacing to the document
task_completion.visual_evidence: The line spacing setting is visibly set to 2.0 in the toolbar/paragraph dialog, or the text visually appears to have wide, double-spaced gaps between lines.

task_completion.description: Set all page margins to 1.0 inch
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Page Style or Page Setup dialog shows 1.00" (or 2.54 cm) for Top, Bottom, Left, and Right margins, or the horizontal/vertical rulers visually indicate 1-inch margins.

task_completion.description: Format the title 'MEMORANDUM OF LAW' as centered and bold
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title text 'MEMORANDUM OF LAW' at the top of the document is bolded and aligned to the center of the page.
The 'Save As' dialog is visible with the filename 'legal_memo_formatted.docx', or the word processor's window title bar updates to show 'legal_memo_formatted.docx'.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to edit the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a word processor interface (like LibreOffice Writer) rather than terminal commands or Python scripts modifying the .docx file.

integrity.description: The agent used the built-in footnote feature rather than manually typing them
integrity.visual_evidence: Footnotes are inserted using the application's 'Insert Footnote' tool (indicated by auto-generated superscript numbers and a separator line), not by manually typing numbers and text at the bottom of the page.

integrity.description: The agent did not overwrite the original draft document
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses the 'Save As' function to create a new file rather than just clicking 'Save' on the original 'legal_memo_draft.docx'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The six cases to be converted to footnotes are: Hadley v. Baxendale, Jacob & Youngs v. Kent, Groves v. John Wunder Co., Peevyhouse v. Garland Coal & Mining Co., Sullivan v. O'Connor, and Hawkins v. McGee. The original document has intentional formatting errors (0.75-inch margins, Calibri 10pt, single spacing). The final document must have 1-inch margins, 12pt Liberation Serif or Times New Roman font, double spacing, and a bold, centered title 'MEMORANDUM OF LAW'. The output file must be named 'legal_memo_formatted.docx' and saved in /home/ga/Documents/.
